original_statement: which party is the most represented by the representatives?
mutated_statement: which stakeholder is the most represented by the agents while simultaneously not represented at all?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Term substitution + Clause addition + Negation/contradiction: "party" → "stakeholder" | "representatives" → "agents" | added "while simultaneously not represented at all" (introduces negation that contradicts "most represented")

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处 judge_thought 与 critique 可识别关键证据：judge_thought 明确写道“问题是ill-posed/self-contradictory”“表格中无‘stakeholder’或‘agents’字段”“不存在同时被最多代表又完全未被代表的stakeholder”；critique 反复指出问题自相矛盾且不可从数据中回答。Agent 的具体表现为：并未尝试执行互斥操作或折中执行，而是在评判中以逻辑推理否定问题可解性，给出事实/逻辑上的解释（结论为“无此类stakeholder”）；同时在执行记录里重复使用不支持的 simple_query 并未主动询问澄清。综上，Agent 不是忽视或修正矛盾，而是以逻辑解释方式合理化矛盾指令，故归入“逻辑解释合理化”。
